## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Homebase to discuss progress on the content generation project using AI.](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Iterated on the article generation flow to improve tone, voice, hyperlinking etc.](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Discussed getting feedback on tone/style from Homebase team to better match their brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Agreed on a hybrid approach for selecting keywords - GrowthX will propose keywords but Homebase can also provide lists](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Got access to Homebase's CMS, discussed process for publishing generated content](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Planned to focus the initial batch of content on payroll and glossary terms as a test](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration

  - [Reviewed latest version of article outline flow and sample generated article](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Feedback: Tone still a bit formal, needs more playfulness. Sentence structure too uniform.](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Kerry to share examples of desired tone from Homebase blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Discussed getting an initial article published soon to start iterating based on real data](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

### Keyword Selection Process

  - [Three options discussed: 1) GrowthX selects, 2) GrowthX proposes for approval, 3) Homebase provides lists](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Agreed on hybrid of 2 & 3 - GrowthX will propose keywords but Homebase can also provide lists](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [For first batch, focus on payroll topics across different verticals (retail, restaurant etc.) and glossary terms](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)

### Publishing Process

  - [Got access to Homebase's CMS, will get familiar with publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Discussed adding contextual call-to-action at end of articles to relevant product pages](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Plan to review final article drafts before publishing to ensure guidelines are met](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kerry to share examples of desired blog tone and provide more detailed feedback](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose initial list of payroll and glossary keywords for approval](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Discuss CMS publishing process and do test publish](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Review final calibrated article drafts for approval before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/uLnrrmzfjVnQybLsamfHnuh2UbFySBED?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
